description: A clinical trial assistant must upload and index documents into the electronic Trial Master File (eTMF) for a study.

nodes.task_description: Receive a new document from a clinical site (e.g., an updated investigator brochure signature page).

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the document via email or a portal.

nodes.task_description: Perform a quality check on the document to ensure it is complete and legible.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the document is signed, dated, and scanned correctly.

nodes.task_description: Upload the document to the eTMF system.
Index the document by assigning the correct TMF reference model code, country, site, and document date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly applies all required metadata to the document in the eTMF.
